scene.message: Nanjo: ...{wait_fr:60}Where is the{nl} real Sonomura?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...What do you mean,{nl} Nanjo?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Wh-what are you{nl} saying?! What do you mean?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That can't...{wait_fr:88}{nl} That's ridiculous!!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Lies! It's all{nl} nonsense!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: {ctl07:1}!{nl} Let's go after her!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: This is bad, {ctl0f:1}!{nl} Aren't you going after her?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...{wait_fr:88}{nl} A pitiful man...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: {ctl0f:1}!{nl} We've gotta find Sonomura!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: This has to be a lie!{nl} It's too cruel for Sonomura!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Poor Maki...{nl} We have to save her...{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori's face in death{nl} is peaceful...{waitkey}{ret}
